text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Kobe Shimbun Hai has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka managed to regain her confidence
at the summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steps onto the track once again to ascertain
whether she's running for the right reasons or not.
